name: Berry Bluff
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour once, then sift it again with the sugar, cinnamon or nutmeg, and baking powder.
2. Combine the eggs and milk. Add to the flour mixture and stir until smooth, adding more milk if necessary to achieve a soft biscuit dough.
3. Stir in the berries and grated lemon rind.
4. Pour the batter into a generously buttered and floured pudding mold. Cover with a layer of paper and cover.
5. Steam for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
6. When done, turn out onto a warm plate and drizzle with lemon juice. Sprinkle with sugar.
7. Serve hot with thick cream.
